name: io.github.codespar/mcp-moonpay
description: MCP server for MoonPay — fiat-to-crypto on/off-ramp across 100+ crypto assets and multiple geographies. Pix supported for Brazil onramp.

environmentVariables.name: MOONPAY_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: MoonPay REST API key (sandbox or production — the key selects the environment)

environmentVariables.name: MOONPAY_PUBLISHABLE_KEY
environmentVariables.description: MoonPay publishable key used as `apiKey` in signed widget URLs (required for sign_buy_url / sign_sell_url).

environmentVariables.name: MOONPAY_SECRET_KEY
environmentVariables.description: MoonPay secret key used to HMAC-SHA256 sign widget URLs (required for sign_buy_url / sign_sell_url).

environmentVariables.name: MOONPAY_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: MoonPay API base URL. Defaults to https://api.moonpay.com.

environmentVariables.name: MOONPAY_BUY_WIDGET_URL
environmentVariables.description: MoonPay buy widget base URL. Defaults to https://buy.moonpay.com.

environmentVariables.name: MOONPAY_SELL_WIDGET_URL
environmentVariables.description: MoonPay sell widget base URL. Defaults to https://sell.moonpay.com.
